title: Fresh Velvety Lazy Sunday Indian Basil Stir-fry
description: A fresh and velvety lazy Sunday dish inspired by Maharashtrian cuisine featuring basil and fermented ingredients for a unique flavor profile suitable for keto-friendly diets.
instructions: Wash and chop the basil into small pieces.
Heat coconut milk in a pan over medium heat until it starts to simmer but not boiling.
Add finely chopped ginger and curry leaves to the heated coconut milk mixture. Stir well to combine.
Gradually add the chopped basil leaves, stirring continuously to prevent them from breaking down too much.
Season with rock salt according to your taste preference.
Serve hot as a side dish or garnished over keto-friendly crackers or naan bread.
